svg.title: GKE ASM — ingress traffic architecture
svg.desc: Traffic flows from external client through GCP internal load balancer, into the int-istio gateway namespace, then routes via VirtualService to api-runtime or svc-runtime workload pods. istiod in istio-system pushes xDS config to all Envoy proxies.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the external client connect to the GKE service mesh?')
sendPrompt('What is the role of GCP Internal Load Balancer in this architecture?')
sendPrompt('What does istiod do in the service mesh control plane?')
sendPrompt('What is the Gateway Service in the int-istio namespace?')
sendPrompt('What runs inside the Gateway Pod in int-istio?')
sendPrompt('How does the Istio Gateway CRD bind to the Gateway Pod?')
sendPrompt('How does a VirtualService route traffic from the Gateway to a service?')
sendPrompt('What is a DestinationRule and how does it work with mTLS?')
sendPrompt('How does the Kubernetes Service select the workload Pod?')
sendPrompt('What runs in the workload Pod alongside the application container?')
sendPrompt('How does a VirtualService route traffic from the Gateway to a service?')
sendPrompt('What is a DestinationRule and how does it work with mTLS?')
sendPrompt('How does the Kubernetes Service select the workload Pod?')
sendPrompt('What runs in the workload Pod alongside the application container?')
